strengths: 20+ years fullstack development with direct recent experience in primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) at Optilyz and re:cinq
Demonstrated architecture and engineering fundamentals through multiple Staff/Senior roles, GISCollective open-source platform, and explicit application of TDD and software craftsmanship practices
Current AI-agent infrastructure expertise at re:cinq with MCP code generators and frameworks directly addresses required AI agent development skills
concerns: No explicit mention of required testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) despite strong TDD background and testing workshops; framework selection is a gap
Nest.js not explicitly mentioned in primary Node.js stack despite being core requirement; only general Node.js experience documented
Kubernetes deployment mentioned for GISCollective but limited depth shown; secondary cloud platforms (GCP, Azure) and authentication/security expertise not highlighted
response.justification: Candidate significantly exceeds experience requirement (20+ years vs 6+ required) with recent direct exposure to primary stack at Optilyz and re:cinq. Demonstrates strong architecture skills, software craftsmanship ethos, and AI-agent infrastructure work that directly aligns with role. Primary limitations are lack of explicit mention of Vitest/Jest/Playwright and Nest.js, though extensive Node.js and testing background suggest these are learnable gaps rather than fundamental capability issues. Missing documentation of security/auth expertise and secondary stack (Kotlin) evidence.
